items.title: Memphis Grizzlies salary cap situation after acquiring Isaiah Stewart.
items.author: Yossi Gozlan
items.body_excerpt:
Memphis Grizzlies salary cap situation after acquiring Isaiah Stewart.

He will go into their $15 million mid-level or their $28.9 million trade exception.

They still have plenty of luxury tax room to take on more salaries, assuming they preserve the big trade exception.

items.title: Kings add some legit 3-point shooting in the NBA Draft:
items.author: Deuce Mason
items.body_excerpt:
Kings add some legit 3-point shooting in the NBA Draft:

Acuff: 44% from 3 on 5.8 attempts
Karaban: 37% on 5.2 attempts 
Sharp: 37% on 7.1 attempts last season

Kings were tied for LAST in 3PT% (34%) and took the fewest threes in the league last season (30.2).

items.body_excerpt:
Maybe no Canadians drafted this year, a rarity for second-most prolific provider of NBA players, but Tyler Bilodeau's grandparents on dad's side are Canadian. His grandpa is from Alberta and played in WHA for Calgary.
Dad was 17th overall NHL pick, mom played in WNBA.

items.title: Pistons can get to nearly $21M in cap space just by renouncing their free agents, minus Jalen Duren.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
Pistons can get to nearly $21M in cap space just by renouncing their free agents, minus Jalen Duren.

There are other waivers and salary-shedding moves Detroit could do to get up over $30M in cap space.

They'd also have the $9.4M Room Exception to use if they go with cap space.
